etsy_title: Notion Template Freelance Project Management Invoice Tracking Client Dashboard Digital Planner
etsy_description:
Stay on top of every project, client, and payment with this all-in-one Notion template built specifically for freelancers. Whether you're a designer, writer, developer, or consultant, this system keeps your business organised and your invoices paid on time.

✅ WHAT'S INCLUDED:
• Project tracker with status pipeline
• Invoice log with payment status
• Client database with contact info
• Task manager linked to projects
• Revenue dashboard with totals

🚀 KEY BENEFITS:
• Never lose track of unpaid invoices again
• See all active projects at a glance
• Save hours on admin every week
• Fully customisable to your workflow
• Works on free Notion accounts

📥 HOW IT WORKS:
After purchase you'll receive a PDF with your unique Notion template link. Click duplicate, and it's ready to use in minutes. No design skills needed.

💡 PERFECT FOR:
Freelancers, solopreneurs, and small creative agencies managing multiple clients.

❓ FAQ:
Q: Do I need a paid Notion account?
A: No, the free plan works perfectly.

Q: Is this a physical product?
A: No, this is a digital download.

Q: Can I customise it?
A: Absolutely, every section is editable.
social_post: Freelancers — stop losing track of invoices and projects! 🗂️ This Notion template keeps your clients, tasks & payments all in one place. Set up in minutes. Works on the free plan. ✅ #NotionTemplate #FreelanceLife #ProductivityTools

etsy_title: ADHD Planner Printable Weekly Time Blocking PDF | Dopamine Rewards ADHD Friendly Planner Instant Download
etsy_description:
Finally, a weekly planner built for the ADHD brain! This printable PDF planner combines proven time-blocking techniques with a fun dopamine reward system to help you stay focused, feel motivated, and actually finish your week feeling good.

Designed with ADHD-friendly features like visual time blocks, priority brain dumps, habit trackers, and bite-sized task breakdowns, this planner removes overwhelm and replaces it with clarity and momentum.

✅ Weekly time-block schedule layout
✅ Daily dopamine reward tracker
✅ Brain dump & priority sort page
✅ Habit + energy level tracker
✅ Clean, low-distraction design
✅ US Letter & A4 sizes included
✅ Print as many copies as you need

This planner is perfect for students, freelancers, parents, and professionals managing ADHD who want structure without rigidity.

Instant digital download — no physical item is shipped.

❓ FAQ
Q: Can I print multiple copies? Yes, unlimited personal use.
Q: What format is this? High-resolution PDF.
Q: Is this editable? No, it is print-ready only.
Q: What sizes are included? US Letter and A4.
Q: Will this work for non-ADHD users? Absolutely — anyone who loves visual planning will love this!
social_post: Struggling to plan your week with ADHD? This printable PDF planner uses time-blocking + dopamine rewards to make focus feel possible 🧠✅ Instant download for $9.99! #ADHDplanner #printableplanner #ADHDproductivity
